name: Shreyansh Jain
bio: Computer applications student building full-stack software, AI-powered applications, and secure systems. Focused on practical engineering, cybersecurity fundamentals, and solving real-world problems through technology.
about: My interest in cybersecurity comes from understanding how software, networks, and operating systems work—and how they can fail. I enjoy learning offensive security techniques, building secure applications, and solving practical security challenges. Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Applications, I am continuously improving my skills through hands-on projects, ethical hacking training, and real-world experimentation. My goal is to become a security engineer who builds software that is secure by design.

resume.title: Software Engineering Resume
resume.description: ATS optimized resume focused on software engineering, AI-powered full-stack projects, cybersecurity, certifications, and technical experience.

experience.title: Ethical Hacking Intern
experience.summary: Developing practical offensive security skills through hands-on training in Linux, networking, web application security, penetration testing, and cybersecurity fundamentals.
